```markdown
#### _8.4.4.21. Division B_
**Table 8.4.4.21.-A (Continued)**
|Col1|Table 8.4.4.21.-B Direct-Expansion Cooling Equipment Part-Load Performance Characteristics Forming Part of Sentence 8.4.4.21.(1)|
|---|---|
|Electric<br>Direct-Expansion<br>(DX) Coil<br>Cooling Capacity<br>Adjustment<br>Curve(s)|This curve or group of curves represents the available total cooling capacity of a DX coil as a function of cooling coil and<br>condenser conditions.<br>(1)<br>where<br>Qavailable = available cooling capacity at present evaporator and condenser<br>conditions, in MBH,<br>CAP_FTEDX = cooling capacity adjustment determined using Equation (2), and<br>Qrated = rated capacity at ARI conditions, in MBH.<br>(2)<br>where<br>twb = entering coil wet-bulb temperature, in °F,<br>todb = outside-air dry-bulb temperature, in °F (If an air-cooled unit uses an<br>evaporative condenser, todb is the effective dry-bulb temperature of<br>the air leaving the evaporative cooling unit.),<br>a = 0.8740302,<br>b = –0.0011416,<br>c = 0.0001711,<br>d = –0.0029570,<br>e = 0.0000102, and<br>f = –0.0000592.|
|Electric<br>Direct-Expansion<br>(DX) Coil<br>Cooling Efficiency<br>Adjustment<br>Curve(s)|This curve or group of curves varies the cooling efficiency of a DX coil as a function of evaporator and condenser conditions<br>and part-load ratio.<br>(3)<br>where<br>Poperating = power draw at specified operating conditions, in kW,<br>Prated = rated power draw at ARI conditions, in kW,<br>EIR_FPLR = electric input ratio adjustment to rated efficiency due to changes in<br>coil load determined using Equation (4),<br>EIR_FT = electric input ratio adjustment to rated efficiency due to environmental<br>variables determined using Equation (6), and<br>CAP_FTEDX = cooling capacity adjustment determined using Equation(2).|
```
